name: Hillary Clinton's Chocolate Chip Oatmeal Cooki
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Light brown sugar, firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, salt, and baking soda.
Set aside.
2. In another large bowl, beat together shortening, light brown sugar,
granulated sugar, and vanilla extract with an electric mixer until
creamy.
3. Add eggs to the mixture, beating until light and fluffy. Mix in the
flour mixture gradually until just combined.
4. Stir in chocolate chips.
5. Drop batter by well-rounded teaspoonfuls onto greased baking sheets.
6. Bake in a preheated 350°F (175°C) oven for 8 to 10 minutes, or until
golden brown.
7. Allow cookies to cool on the sheets for 2 minutes before transferring
them to a wire rack to cool completely.
Makes approximately 75 cookies.
